title: Will 2 Republicans advance from the June 2 California gubernatorial top-two primary?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 3%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: Combined GOP polling (~33%) is far below the combined Democratic field (~55%); CA has never sent two Republicans out of a top-two gov primary. Near-zero.
key_drivers: no precedent for 2 R in CA top-two
